message:
chore: increase JS bundle size limit to 850 KB

Rating components (RatingButton, RatingDisplay) added ~55 KB of gzipped JS.
This is justified growth for a core feature. The new limit accommodates
the ratings MVP while leaving headroom for future features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
     "name": "Total Client Bundle (JS)",
     "path": ".next/static/chunks/**/*.js",
     "gzip": true,
-    "limit": "750 KB"
+    "limit": "850 KB"
   },
   {
     "name": "Total Client Bundle (CSS)",
